name: Gmail Inbox Analyzer — AI Email Categorizer
description: Fetch recent emails from Gmail, use Claude AI to categorize and prioritize them, then send a formatted summary to Slack. Helps you triage your inbox automatically.

source.originalName: Learn n8n basics in 3 easy steps

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the email summary

maxEmails.description: Maximum number of recent emails to analyze (default 10)

steps.name: Build Slack Block Kit email digest
